title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 511.060 - When set aside
text:
511.060.  When set aside. — The judgment may, for good cause shown, be set aside at any time within thirty days after it is entered, upon such terms as are just.
(RSMo 1939 § 1242, A.L. 1957 p. 297) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1076; 1919 § 1527; 1909 § 2096
